description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:noble Docker image and a redis:latest service, with a before_script that updates apt, installs texinfo, guile-3.0, guile-3.0-dev, build-essential, automake, git, autoconf, libtool, mariadb development libraries, nss3, gettext, redis, libcurl4-openssl-dev and locales, then clones, checks out, builds and installs guile-dbi 2.1.8, guile-dbd-mysql 2.1.8, guile-curl v0.9, guile-redis 2.2.0, guile-json 4.7.3, runs autogen.sh, configures and installs the main project. Define a single stage named test. Add a test job in the test stage that runs only on the master branch, sets REDIS_HOST, REDIS_PORT and REDIS_URL variables to point to the redis service, and executes "make test && guile -c '(display (@ (artanis artanis) artanis-version))'". No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
